summary.en: Parley automates flat-fee legal work with LLMs, starting with immigration work visas and green cards.
summary.zh: Parley 運用大型語言模型自動化固定收費的法律工作,從移民工作簽證與綠卡開始。

highlight.en: Immigration lawyers spend 20+ hours on writing-intensive visa filings; Parley embeds in their workflow to handle the reading, writing, and compiling that make up 80% of the work.
highlight.zh: 移民律師處理一份書面密集的簽證申請需花費 20 多小時,Parley 嵌入其工作流程,負責佔整體工作 80% 的閱讀、撰寫與彙整。

summary.en: Praxos is a personal AI companion that acts on commands and runs persistent directives via voice and text.
summary.zh: Praxos 是一款個人 AI 夥伴,可透過語音和文字執行指令並持續運行常駐任務。

highlight.en: Beyond one-off commands, Praxos can hold standing directives that it keeps running for you over time across both voice and text.
highlight.zh: 除了一次性指令外,Praxos 還能保留常駐任務,透過語音與文字長期為你持續執行。

summary.en: Refactor deploys secure, reliable AI agents for large healthcare, retail, and logistics organizations.
summary.zh: Refactor 為大型醫療、零售與物流組織部署安全可靠的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Refactor builds autonomous systems that call, click, and navigate legacy software, working with companies serving tens of millions of customers and $50B+ in annual revenue.
highlight.zh: Refactor 打造能撥打、點擊並操作老舊軟體系統的自主系統,服務對象包含擁有數千萬客戶、年營收逾 500 億美元的企業。

summary.en: Polymet uses AI to help non-designers create production-ready designs and front-end code.
summary.zh: Polymet 運用 AI 協助非設計師打造可直接上線的設計與前端程式碼。

highlight.en: Users describe what they want or provide an image and Polymet designs the interface, letting teams cover the design function themselves instead of hiring designers or contractors.
highlight.zh: 使用者描述需求或提供圖片,Polymet 即可設計出介面,讓團隊自行承擔設計工作,無需聘請設計師或外包人員。

summary.en: Rastro is the fastest way for distributors and manufacturers to launch product catalogs.
summary.zh: Rastro 是經銷商與製造商上架產品型錄最快的方式。

highlight.en: Rastro turns catalog chaos into launch-ready products by pulling online specs and pricing, fuzzy-matching to your database, generating images, and outputting products in your exact schema.
highlight.zh: Rastro 透過抓取線上規格與定價、模糊比對你的資料庫、生成圖片並依你指定的格式輸出產品,將混亂的型錄轉化為可上架的產品。

summary.en: RentFlow builds AI infrastructure that aligns business rent payments with companies' cash flow.
summary.zh: RentFlow 打造 AI 基礎設施,讓企業的租金繳付與其現金流相互契合。

highlight.en: With roughly 50% of US businesses late on rent monthly, RentFlow underwrites fixed rent in real time from transaction-level data to sync it with how cash actually comes in.
highlight.zh: 美國約有 50% 的企業每月延遲繳租,RentFlow 依交易層級的資料即時核保固定租金,使其與實際現金進帳時間同步。

summary.en: pap! runs agents that automatically claim money consumers are owed when they shop, travel, and live.
summary.zh: pap! 運行的代理會自動為消費者領回他們在購物、旅行與日常生活中應得的款項。

highlight.en: Consumers miss $70B+ yearly in refunds, flight compensation, class-action payouts, and unclaimed funds; pap! reads email receipts and claims the money automatically after a one-time sign-up.
highlight.zh: 消費者每年錯失逾 700 億美元的退款、航班補償、集體訴訟賠付與未領款項;pap! 在你一次註冊後便自動讀取電子郵件收據並代為領取。

summary.en: Rowboat Labs builds an open-source AI coworker with memory for everyday work.
summary.zh: Rowboat Labs 打造一款具備記憶力的開源 AI 同事,協助處理日常工作。

highlight.en: Rowboat builds a local knowledge graph from your work to draft emails, prep meetings, and track projects on your own computer, with batteries-included tools and MCP support.
highlight.zh: Rowboat 從你的工作中建立本機知識圖譜,在你自己的電腦上草擬郵件、籌備會議並追蹤專案,內建多項工具並支援 MCP。

summary.en: Ficra is a real-time source of truth for every product screen and user flow.
summary.zh: Ficra 是每個產品畫面與使用者流程的即時真實來源。

highlight.en: Ficra's AI builds a live visual map of every screen, flow, A/B test, and notification, sparing product teams the 25% of time spent auditing user flows to find funnel blind spots.
highlight.zh: Ficra 的 AI 為每個畫面、流程、A/B 測試與通知建立即時視覺地圖,讓產品團隊省去花在稽核使用者流程、找出轉換漏斗盲點上的 25% 時間。

summary.en: XTraffic provides technology for cities to automate and manage their traffic lights.
summary.zh: XTraffic 提供讓城市自動化並管理交通號誌的技術。

highlight.en: Riding advances in affordable sensor technology, XTraffic is live across multiple cities with pilots and intersection corridors, delivering less traffic, better safety, and planning data.
highlight.zh: 乘著價格親民的感測技術進展,XTraffic 已在多座城市上線,進行試點與多路口走廊部署,帶來更少壅塞、更佳安全與規劃所需數據。

summary.en: Mica's AI agents replace the data ops teams that manually fix bad data.
summary.zh: Mica 的 AI 代理取代了人工修復不良資料的數據維運團隊。

highlight.en: When orchestration, retries, and monitoring fail, Mica gathers information from internal docs and external systems, reasons across context, and resolves data errors autonomously with full auditability.
highlight.zh: 當編排、重試與監控都失效時,Mica 會從內部文件與外部系統收集資訊、跨情境推理,並在完整可稽核的情況下自主解決資料錯誤。

summary.en: Midship rebuilds internal audit with AI agents, starting with SOX testing.
summary.zh: Midship 以 AI 代理重新打造內部稽核,從 SOX 測試著手。

highlight.en: Midship's AI agents perform audit work end to end, giving auditors leverage to focus on higher-value risk and advisory work.
highlight.zh: Midship 的 AI 代理端到端執行稽核工作,讓稽核人員得以專注於更高價值的風險與顧問工作。

summary.en: Bits to Atoms matches job seekers to specialized roles at deep technology startups.
summary.zh: Bits to Atoms 為求職者媒合深科技新創公司的專業職缺。

highlight.en: Filling highly specialized deep-tech roles is extremely difficult, so Bits to Atoms streamlines matching and fills candidates' skill gaps where necessary.
highlight.zh: 深科技領域高度專業的職缺極難填補,Bits to Atoms 因此簡化媒合流程,並在必要時補足求職者的技能落差。

summary.en: PathPilot deploys AI agents for lending operations like onboarding, servicing, and collections.
summary.zh: PathPilot 為入帳、貸後服務與催收等放款作業部署 AI 代理。

highlight.en: PathPilot's specialized agents handle 60–80% of high-volume workflows embedded in existing systems, letting lenders grow loan volume without proportional headcount growth.
highlight.zh: PathPilot 的專用代理嵌入既有系統,處理 60–80% 的高量作業流程,讓放款機構在不需等比增聘人力下擴大貸款規模。

summary.en: Simplex builds AI agents to handle provider enrollment with payors end-to-end.
summary.zh: Simplex 打造 AI 代理,端到端處理醫療提供者向保險公司的登錄作業。

highlight.en: Simplex pulls provider data from CAQH, fills enrollment forms across payor portals, email, and phone, handles corrections, and follows up on effective dates fully autonomously.
highlight.zh: Simplex 從 CAQH 抓取提供者資料,透過保險公司入口、電子郵件與電話填寫登錄表單,處理退件修正並追蹤生效日,全程自主完成。

summary.en: Overeasy is a B2B company from YC's Summer 2024 batch.
summary.zh: Overeasy 是 YC 2024 年夏季梯次的 B2B 公司。

highlight.en: Overeasy is an early-stage B2B startup in the YC Summer 2024 batch; further product details are not yet publicly available.
highlight.zh: Overeasy 是 YC 2024 年夏季梯次的早期 B2B 新創,目前尚無更多公開的產品細節。

summary.en: Roger is an AI SDR that automates outbound sales and follows up with leads 24/7.
summary.zh: Roger 是一款 AI 業務開發代表,自動化外撥銷售並全天候跟進潛在客戶。

highlight.en: Built by Augment, Roger acts as an intelligent CRM that actively manages the pipeline, tracks interactions, and crafts personalized outreach across email and LinkedIn, refining based on engagement.
highlight.zh: 由 Augment 打造的 Roger 是一款智慧型 CRM,主動管理銷售管道、追蹤互動,並跨電子郵件與 LinkedIn 撰寫個人化開發訊息,再依互動數據持續優化。

summary.en: Doublezero is a platform to build, operate, and monetize fully autonomous agents.
summary.zh: Doublezero 是一個打造、運行並將完全自主代理變現的平台。

highlight.en: Doublezero handles reasoning frameworks, state, analytics, and monetization while a runner UI lets users play, pause, rewind, and intervene, plus a marketplace to discover and share agents.
highlight.zh: Doublezero 處理推理框架、狀態、分析與變現,並以運行介面讓使用者播放、暫停、倒帶與介入,還有市集供探索與分享代理。

summary.en: Cheers is a full-stack GEO platform that helps local businesses win search on ChatGPT and other LLMs.
summary.zh: Cheers 是一個全方位的 GEO 平台,協助在地企業在 ChatGPT 等大型語言模型上勝出。

highlight.en: Cheers audits AI visibility, builds optimization plans, and gives teams NFC review tools; Vivint generated 70,000+ five-star reviews in 5 months and now ranks #1 on ChatGPT across its markets.
highlight.zh: Cheers 稽核 AI 能見度、制定優化計畫,並提供 NFC 評論工具;Vivint 在 5 個月內累積逾 7 萬則五星評論,如今在其市場的 ChatGPT 搜尋上名列第一。

summary.en: Pre was an AI accountability agent and execution system for startup founders.
summary.zh: Pre 曾是一款為新創創辦人打造的 AI 督責代理與執行系統。

highlight.en: Founders set a 10-week goal and connected their tools, and Pre pushed them toward their highest-impact work each week by tracking outcomes rather than effort.
highlight.zh: 創辦人設定 10 週目標並串接工具,Pre 透過追蹤成果而非投入,每週督促他們完成最具影響力的工作。

summary.en: Flyflow helped companies find high-quality sales leads using AI workflows.
summary.zh: Flyflow 曾運用 AI 工作流程協助企業找到高品質的銷售名單。

highlight.en: Flyflow let teams build a highly relevant prospect list in under 10 minutes, combining web research, company-size filtering, and LinkedIn lookups in one place instead of mass cold emails.
highlight.zh: Flyflow 讓團隊在 10 分鐘內建立高度相關的潛客名單,將網路調查、依公司規模篩選與 LinkedIn 查找整合於一處,取代大量冷郵件。

summary.en: Callback offers AI automation for complicated, real-world business operations workflows.
summary.zh: Callback 為複雜的真實業務維運流程提供 AI 自動化。

highlight.en: Callback integrates with enterprises' existing systems and serves as an auditable, permissioned system of record for their operations.
highlight.zh: Callback 串接企業既有系統,並作為其維運中可稽核、具權限控管的記錄系統。

summary.en: ideate.xyz is an AI-powered 3D art suite that runs in the web browser.
summary.zh: ideate.xyz 是一套在網頁瀏覽器中運行、由 AI 驅動的 3D 美術工具組。

highlight.en: Its text-to-image-to-3D pipeline rapidly generates model assets, while a browser-based texture projection and inpainting editor plus upscaling and compression make assets production-ready.
highlight.zh: 其文字轉圖片轉 3D 流程能快速生成模型素材,瀏覽器內的紋理投影與修補編輯器加上升頻與壓縮,讓素材達到可上線水準。

summary.en: Azalea Robotics automates airport baggage handling with intelligent robot operations.
summary.zh: Azalea Robotics 以智慧機器人作業自動化機場行李處理。

highlight.en: Targeting the $20B+ baggage handling market where airports processed ~4.5 billion bags in 2023, Azalea's robotic systems improve efficiency, cut mishandling, and ease physically demanding work.
highlight.zh: 瞄準 2023 年處理約 45 億件行李、規模逾 200 億美元的行李處理市場,Azalea 的機器人系統提升效率、減少誤處理並緩解高體力負荷的工作。

summary.en: RetroFix lets you automate any workflow by describing it in plain English.
summary.zh: RetroFix 讓你用白話英文描述,即可自動化任何工作流程。

highlight.en: Describe a workflow in natural language and RetroFix's agent builds it end-to-end across 2000+ app integrations, writing code to access full APIs when no pre-built step exists.
highlight.zh: 以自然語言描述工作流程,RetroFix 的代理便能跨 2000 多個應用整合端到端建立;當無現成步驟時,還會撰寫程式碼存取完整 API。

summary.en: Rewbi uses AI to optimize grid-connected battery storage and roughly double its revenue.
summary.zh: Rewbi 運用 AI 優化併網電池儲能,使其營收約增加一倍。

highlight.en: Rewbi rents batteries for a fixed monthly fee and earns 2x by tracking hundreds of live inputs and dispatching faster than human traders as electricity prices shift every 5 minutes by 300%+.
highlight.zh: Rewbi 以固定月費租用電池,透過追蹤數百項即時輸入並比人工交易員更快調度,在電價每 5 分鐘變動逾 300% 之際賺取 2 倍費用。

summary.en: Zuni is a Chrome extension that puts an AI assistant in your browser sidebar.
summary.zh: Zuni 是一款 Chrome 擴充功能,在瀏覽器側邊欄放入 AI 助理。

highlight.en: Zuni uses what it sees on any of your tabs as context and proactively helps draft messages and emails directly within the browser.
highlight.zh: Zuni 以你任一分頁所見內容為情境,主動協助在瀏覽器內草擬訊息與電子郵件。

summary.en: Scape is an AI-native CRM that automatically captures all your conversations.
summary.zh: Scape 是一款 AI 原生 CRM,自動擷取你所有的對話。

highlight.en: Scape automatically organizes a team's emails and meeting notes so anything is findable in seconds, with intelligent email drafts that reclaim hours each day.
highlight.zh: Scape 自動整理團隊的電子郵件與會議筆記,讓一切在數秒內可查,並以智慧郵件草稿每天省下數小時。

summary.en: Storia AI builds an open-source copilot that understands a company's codebase and its context.
summary.zh: Storia AI 打造一款理解公司程式碼庫及其脈絡的開源副駕。

highlight.en: Its Perplexity-like agent Sage answers questions like which vector database fits a project's SLA, with replies grounded in documentation and external references like GitHub.
highlight.zh: 其類似 Perplexity 的代理 Sage 能回答諸如哪個向量資料庫符合專案 SLA 的問題,回覆皆有文件與 GitHub 等外部參考佐證。

summary.en: Lucible is a combined checking and investment account that lets you invest 100% of your money while still spending it.
summary.zh: Lucible 是結合支票與投資的帳戶,讓你投資全部資金的同時仍能消費。

highlight.en: When you spend, Lucible issues a real-time loan against your investments as collateral, mirroring how the ultra-wealthy finance purchases for the most capital- and tax-efficient way to manage money.
highlight.zh: 當你消費時,Lucible 即時以你的投資為擔保發放貸款,複製超富階層融資購物的做法,達到最具資本與稅務效率的資金管理。

summary.en: Ares Industries is building low-cost cruise missiles.
summary.zh: Ares Industries 正在打造低成本巡弋飛彈。

highlight.en: Ares Industries focuses on low-cost cruise missiles, pursuing affordability in a class of weaponry that has traditionally been expensive to produce.
highlight.zh: Ares Industries 專注於低成本巡弋飛彈,在這類向來造價昂貴的武器上追求可負擔性。

summary.en: CodeViz creates interactive codebase maps to help engineers understand and navigate code.
summary.zh: CodeViz 製作互動式程式碼庫地圖,協助工程師理解並瀏覽程式碼。

highlight.en: Founded by two ex-Tesla engineers to tackle the 75% of development time lost to reading code, CodeViz is used by engineers at Amazon, Microsoft, and Roblox.
highlight.zh: 由兩位前 Tesla 工程師創立,旨在解決開發中有 75% 時間耗於閱讀程式碼的問題,CodeViz 已獲 Amazon、Microsoft 與 Roblox 的工程師採用。

summary.en: Lore transforms your iMessage conversations into shareable stories.
summary.zh: Lore 將你的 iMessage 對話轉化為可分享的故事。

highlight.en: Founded by ex-Google Photos and AI engineers, Lore brings the "turn personal data into something you come back to" loop to relationships.
highlight.zh: 由前 Google Photos 與 AI 工程師創立,Lore 將「把個人資料變成你會一再回味的內容」這套循環帶入人際關係。

summary.en: MinusX is an open-source agentic BI data agent for founders.
summary.zh: MinusX 是一款為創辦人打造的開源代理式 BI 數據代理。

highlight.en: MinusX builds dashboards from your data and notifies you when something's up; you can interrogate all your data via Slack or MCP on its open-source BI platform.
highlight.zh: MinusX 從你的資料建立儀表板,並在出現異常時通知你;你可在其開源 BI 平台上透過 Slack 或 MCP 查詢所有資料。

summary.en: Tivara is an AI workforce for medical groups.
summary.zh: Tivara 是為醫療團體打造的 AI 人力。

highlight.en: Tivara provides an AI workforce purpose-built for medical groups, targeting healthcare's staffing and operational demands.
highlight.zh: Tivara 提供專為醫療團體量身打造的 AI 人力,瞄準醫療領域的人力與營運需求。

summary.en: Substrate provides AI agents for medical billing teams.
summary.zh: Substrate 為醫療帳務團隊提供 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Substrate's AI agents automate the repetitive click-work and data entry in revenue cycle management, increasing efficiency and reducing errors for medical billers.
highlight.zh: Substrate 的 AI 代理自動化營收週期管理中重複的點擊操作與資料輸入,為醫療帳務人員提升效率並減少錯誤。

summary.en: Kopra Bio makes genetically engineered viruses that teach the immune system to kill cancer.
summary.zh: Kopra Bio 製造基因工程病毒,教導免疫系統消滅癌症。

highlight.en: Using UCSF-developed tech, Kopra targets glioblastoma; in the most challenging brain cancer model it improved survival from 0% with current FDA-approved treatment to 90%.
highlight.zh: Kopra 運用 UCSF 開發的技術瞄準膠質母細胞瘤;在最具挑戰性的腦癌模型中,將存活率從現行 FDA 核准療法的 0% 提升至 90%。

summary.en: Ontra Mobility is a platform for cities and transit agencies to optimize transit and boost ridership.
summary.zh: Ontra Mobility 是一個讓城市與運輸機構優化交通並提升搭乘量的平台。

highlight.en: Founded by two former Google engineers with operations-research PhDs, Ontra powered MARTA Reach in Atlanta and CAT SMART in Savannah with data-driven planning and real-time optimization.
highlight.zh: 由兩位擁有作業研究博士學位的前 Google 工程師創立,Ontra 以資料驅動規劃與即時優化,支撐亞特蘭大的 MARTA Reach 與薩凡納的 CAT SMART。

summary.en: Promi optimizes ecommerce pricing with dynamic, personalized discounts.
summary.zh: Promi 以動態、個人化的折扣優化電商定價。

highlight.en: Instead of guesswork, Promi uses store data to dynamically set the best discount per product, per user, at the right time to maximize sales and profit.
highlight.zh: Promi 不再憑感覺,而是運用商店資料,針對每項產品、每位使用者在合適時機動態設定最佳折扣,以最大化銷售與利潤。

summary.en: expand.ai instantly turns any website into a type-safe API you can rely on.
summary.zh: expand.ai 能即時把任何網站變成可靠的型別安全 API。

highlight.en: You can request data from any website instantly or have expand.ai build datasets, while it handles bot protection, browser infrastructure scaling, and verifying only correct information.
highlight.zh: 你可即時向任何網站請求資料,或讓 expand.ai 建立資料集,而它負責處理機器人防護、瀏覽器基礎設施擴展,並只擷取經驗證正確的資訊。

summary.en: ReactWise is an AI co-pilot for chemical process optimization.
summary.zh: ReactWise 是化學製程優化的 AI 副駕。

highlight.en: ReactWise equips wet-lab chemists with data-driven optimization and robotic experiment execution to speed up the slow, trial-and-error chemical process development that delays drug launches.
highlight.zh: ReactWise 為實驗室化學家配備資料驅動優化與機器人實驗執行,加速那拖延藥物上市、緩慢且靠試誤的化學製程開發。

summary.en: Vibe lets everyone turn their thoughts into real-world apps through conversation.
summary.zh: Vibe 讓每個人都能透過對話將想法變成真實的應用程式。

highlight.en: Vibe aims to make everyone a software engineer by letting people build real apps simply by describing what they want in conversation.
highlight.zh: Vibe 立志讓人人都能成為軟體工程師,只需透過對話描述需求即可打造真實應用程式。

summary.en: deepsilicon built software and hardware to run neural networks faster and cheaper.
summary.zh: deepsilicon 曾打造讓神經網路運行更快、更省成本的軟體與硬體。

highlight.en: deepsilicon tackled neural network efficiency from both the software and hardware sides to reduce the cost and increase the speed of running models.
highlight.zh: deepsilicon 從軟體與硬體兩端著手神經網路效率,以降低運行模型的成本並提升速度。

summary.en: Biocartesian converts biology into digital molecular maps of diseased tissue.
summary.zh: Biocartesian 將生物學轉化為病變組織的數位分子地圖。

highlight.en: Current tools see under 1% of the abnormal molecules in diseased tissue; Biocartesian combines microscopy with new chemistries to see 50x more for deeper disease insights.
highlight.zh: 現有工具僅能看見病變組織中不到 1% 的異常分子;Biocartesian 結合顯微術與新化學技術,看見多達 50 倍的分子,提供更深入的疾病洞見。

summary.en: winfunc is an AI-native security engineer for mission-critical codebases.
summary.zh: winfunc 是為關鍵任務程式碼庫打造的 AI 原生資安工程師。

highlight.en: winfunc autonomously finds, verifies, and patches vulnerabilities with context-aware scanning, and has already surfaced bugs in Google, Supabase, Sentry, Cal, Gumroad, and Bun.
highlight.zh: winfunc 以情境感知掃描自主發現、驗證並修補漏洞,已在 Google、Supabase、Sentry、Cal、Gumroad 與 Bun 等系統中找出弱點。

summary.en: BeeBettor is a Robinhood-style app for sports prediction markets.
summary.zh: BeeBettor 是運動預測市場的 Robinhood 式應用程式。

highlight.en: Sports bettors juggle 40+ apps each with its own KYC; BeeBettor aggregates them into one app and automatically finds the best available price.
highlight.zh: 運動下注者要周旋於 40 多個各有 KYC 流程的應用程式;BeeBettor 將它們整合成單一應用,並自動找出最優價格。

summary.en: Mage Legal provides automatic AI legal due diligence across your data room.
summary.zh: Mage Legal 為你的資料室提供自動化 AI 法律盡職調查。

highlight.en: Mage surfaces red and yellow flags, drafts memos, and compares redlines so nothing falls through the cracks across the entire data room.
highlight.zh: Mage 標示紅旗與黃旗、草擬備忘錄並比對修訂內容,確保整個資料室無一遺漏。

summary.en: Kura AI builds state-of-the-art browser agents for interacting with websites.
summary.zh: Kura AI 打造業界領先、用於操作網站的瀏覽器代理。

highlight.en: Kura scores 87% on the WebVoyager benchmark, 31% better than Claude's Computer Use demo and 14% above the previous state of the art.
highlight.zh: Kura 在 WebVoyager 基準測試達 87%,比 Claude 的 Computer Use 示範高 31%,並超越前一個業界最佳水準 14%。

summary.en: Ember Robotics is Datadog for robots, building observability tools for robots and IoT devices.
summary.zh: Ember Robotics 是機器人版的 Datadog,為機器人與 IoT 裝置打造可觀測性工具。

highlight.en: Founded by former Tesla Autopilot engineers, Ember's hardware and system observability tools help teams catch failures early and reduce downtime from prototype to scale.
highlight.zh: 由前 Tesla Autopilot 工程師創立,Ember 的硬體與系統可觀測性工具協助團隊及早發現故障,並從原型到量產減少停機。

summary.en: Pinnacle offers an API and SDK for RCS, the next generation of texting.
summary.zh: Pinnacle 提供下一代簡訊技術 RCS 的 API 與 SDK。

highlight.en: Pinnacle gives developers an API for RCS, the new SMS standard that enables app-like text messages.
highlight.zh: Pinnacle 為開發者提供 RCS 的 API,這是讓簡訊具備應用程式般體驗的新標準。

summary.en: Mineflow is an AI platform that predicts the shape and location of mineral deposits.
summary.zh: Mineflow 是一個預測礦床形狀與位置的 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Because drilling is expensive, accurate deposit predictions matter; in early trials with a lithium miner Mineflow predicted hard-rock lithium deposit shapes over an order of magnitude more accurately than competitors.
highlight.zh: 由於鑽探昂貴,精準的礦床預測至關重要;在與一家鋰礦公司的早期試驗中,Mineflow 預測硬岩鋰礦床形狀的準確度比競爭對手高出一個數量級以上。

summary.en: Cerulion is an open-source operating system for robots, built by two MIT robotics PhDs.
summary.zh: Cerulion 是由兩位 MIT 機器人博士打造的開源機器人作業系統。

highlight.en: With up to 1000x better communications performance than ROS, Cerulion is used by Amazon Robotics and the Boston Dynamics AI Institute to develop faster and ship more reliable robots.
highlight.zh: Cerulion 的通訊效能比 ROS 高出多達 1000 倍,已獲 Amazon Robotics 與波士頓動力 AI 研究院採用,以更快開發並推出更可靠的機器人。

summary.en: Sensei helps robotics companies scale and outsource their training data collection.
summary.zh: Sensei 協助機器人公司擴大並外包其訓練資料的收集。

highlight.en: Sensei's hardware collects human-demonstration data at a tenth of the cost and twice the speed of current teleop, while a network of paid operators acts like Scale AI for robotics data.
highlight.zh: Sensei 的硬體以現行遠端操控十分之一的成本、兩倍的速度收集人類示範資料,並由付費操作員網絡扮演機器人資料界的 Scale AI。

summary.en: Palmier is a video editor built for AI, where Claude and Codex can edit your timeline directly.
summary.zh: Palmier 是為 AI 打造的影片編輯器,Claude 與 Codex 可直接編輯你的時間軸。

highlight.en: Palmier Pro lets AI trim, reorder, and generate footage on the timeline; it was used to make 15+ cinematic AI launch videos for YC companies and is now open-source and free.
highlight.zh: Palmier Pro 讓 AI 在時間軸上修剪、重新排序與生成素材;它已用於為 YC 公司製作 15 部以上電影感 AI 發表影片,現已開源並免費提供。

summary.en: Sonatoria helps startups grow organically.
summary.zh: Sonatoria 協助新創公司有機成長。

highlight.en: Sonatoria is a B2B startup in the YC Summer 2024 batch focused on helping startups achieve organic growth.
highlight.zh: Sonatoria 是 YC 2024 年夏季梯次的 B2B 新創,專注於協助新創公司實現有機成長。

summary.en: RiskAngle delivered AI medical record summaries in minutes for insurers and law firms.
summary.zh: RiskAngle 曾為保險公司與律師事務所在數分鐘內提供 AI 醫療紀錄摘要。

highlight.en: RiskAngle's platform summarized unstructured medical records to help users streamline underwriting, expedite claims processing, and prepare cases with confidence.
highlight.zh: RiskAngle 的平台彙整非結構化的醫療紀錄,協助使用者簡化核保、加速理賠處理並有把握地準備案件。

summary.en: Baseline AI uses AI for document creation and data management in clinical trials.
summary.zh: Baseline AI 運用 AI 處理臨床試驗的文件製作與資料管理。

highlight.en: Baseline automates creating data collection forms, database design, error checks, and analysis code from the study protocol, saving up to $27M in costs and revenue for a single phase 3 trial.
highlight.zh: Baseline 從研究計畫書自動生成資料收集表單、資料庫設計、錯誤檢查與分析程式碼,單一第三期試驗可省下多達 2700 萬美元的成本與營收。

summary.en: Odo is an email assistant that organizes, drafts emails, and follows up after meetings.
summary.zh: Odo 是一款電子郵件助理,負責整理、草擬郵件並在會議後跟進。

highlight.en: Odo aims to give you a better morning by helping organize your inbox, draft emails, and follow up effortlessly after meetings.
highlight.zh: Odo 旨在讓你擁有更美好的早晨,協助整理收件匣、草擬郵件,並在會議後輕鬆跟進。

summary.en: Haystack is an agent-native control layer that helps teams manage AI-generated pull requests.
summary.zh: Haystack 是一個代理原生的控制層,協助團隊管理 AI 生成的拉取請求。

highlight.en: Sitting on top of GitHub, Haystack weighs the diff, agent trace, author intent, and test evidence for each PR to decide whether it can move forward, needs fixes, or requires human review.
highlight.zh: Haystack 建構在 GitHub 之上,針對每個 PR 衡量差異、代理軌跡、作者意圖與測試證據,判斷其可放行、需修正,或須由人工審查。

summary.en: Rescript is an AI tool for legal and public policy teams to research and monitor changing laws.
summary.zh: Rescript 是供法律與公共政策團隊研究並監控法規變動的 AI 工具。

highlight.en: F100 enterprises, AmLaw100 firms, and top lobbying firms use Rescript to summarize the legal landscape for their issues and track how it changes over time; backed by YC, General Catalyst, and Floodgate.
highlight.zh: 財星百大企業、AmLaw100 律所與頂尖遊說公司使用 Rescript 彙整其議題的法律全貌並追蹤其隨時間的變化;由 YC、General Catalyst 與 Floodgate 支持。

summary.en: Thyme is the operating system for financial advisors.
summary.zh: Thyme 是為理財顧問打造的作業系統。

highlight.en: Serving the 300k+ US advisors stuck on digital Rolodexes, Thyme auto-takes meeting notes, manages client records with AI, and offers a client portal, replacing legacy CRMs and billing tools.
highlight.zh: Thyme 服務 30 萬名以上仍倚賴數位通訊錄的美國顧問,自動記錄會議筆記、以 AI 管理客戶資料並提供客戶入口,取代老舊的 CRM 與計費工具。

summary.en: Handled automates post-order operations for e-commerce brands and 3PLs.
summary.zh: Handled 為電商品牌與第三方物流自動化訂單後作業。

highlight.en: Handled unifies post-order data across commerce, warehouse, carrier, and support systems to execute the shipment-tracking, returns, and invoice work that otherwise scales linearly with order volume.
highlight.zh: Handled 跨電商、倉儲、承運商與客服系統整合訂單後資料,執行那些原本隨訂單量等比增加的物流追蹤、退貨與發票工作。

summary.en: Propaya uses AI for commercial lease abstraction and review.
summary.zh: Propaya 運用 AI 進行商業租約摘要與審查。

highlight.en: Propaya abstracts and analyzes commercial leases in minutes with clause-cited insights and linked schedules, plus market benchmarks and deal evaluation tools for brokers, attorneys, and real estate heads.
highlight.zh: Propaya 在數分鐘內摘要並分析商業租約,提供引用條款的洞見與連結附表,並為仲介、律師與不動產主管提供市場基準與交易評估工具。

summary.en: Entropy provides autonomous intake and revenue cycle management for specialty clinics.
summary.zh: Entropy 為專科診所提供自主病患受理與營收週期管理。

highlight.en: Entropy automates patient intake across emails, calls, and faxes and interactions with payors, helping specialty clinics see patients quicker, keep referrers in the loop, and get paid on time.
highlight.zh: Entropy 跨電子郵件、電話與傳真自動化病患受理及與保險公司的往來,協助專科診所更快看診、讓轉介者掌握進度並準時收款。

summary.en: Orca lets you build, discover, and play Minecraft games with friends.
summary.zh: Orca 讓你與朋友一起打造、探索並遊玩 Minecraft 遊戲。

highlight.en: Orca is a Minecraft game launcher where players join experiences with one click and no setup, while Orca handles hosting and mod delivery so creators earn revenue—Roblox built on Minecraft's 312M players.
highlight.zh: Orca 是 Minecraft 遊戲啟動器,玩家一鍵即可加入體驗、無需設定,Orca 負責主機代管與模組派送,讓創作者賺取收益,有如建構在 Minecraft 3.12 億玩家之上的 Roblox。

summary.en: Typa is a content engine that helps businesses win attention and drive growth.
summary.zh: Typa 是一個內容引擎,協助企業贏得關注並推動成長。

highlight.en: Typa learns your tone of voice, keeps a real-time knowledge base of your thinking, and offers Puff, a 24/7 AI ghostwriter via phone or WhatsApp, across X, LinkedIn, Bluesky, and newsletters.
highlight.zh: Typa 學習你的語氣、即時更新你思維的知識庫,並提供可透過電話或 WhatsApp 隨時使用的 24/7 AI 代筆助手 Puff,涵蓋 X、LinkedIn、Bluesky 與電子報。

summary.en: Quetzal is a simple, LLM-first translation and internationalization suite for software.
summary.zh: Quetzal 是一套以大型語言模型為核心、簡易的軟體翻譯與在地化工具組。

highlight.en: Quetzal translates and internationalizes software and content instantly with minimal setup, handling stakeholder management and go-to-market so teams no longer wait days or weeks for translations.
highlight.zh: Quetzal 以最少設定即時翻譯並在地化軟體與內容,並處理相關人員協調與市場推進,讓團隊不再為翻譯等上數天或數週。

summary.en: TradeFlow is AI-powered settlement for financial securities.
summary.zh: TradeFlow 是以 AI 驅動的金融證券交割服務。

highlight.en: Trade settlement is costly and reliant on manual emails, disparate systems, and inconsistent data; TradeFlow lets back offices offload these time-intensive tasks to AI.
highlight.zh: 交易交割成本高昂,且仰賴人工郵件、分散系統與不一致的資料;TradeFlow 讓後勤部門將這些耗時工作交由 AI 處理。

summary.en: Saldor is an AI-native procurement and accounts payable platform.
summary.zh: Saldor 是一個 AI 原生的採購與應付帳款平台。

highlight.en: Saldor takes every purchase from request all the way to paid, unifying procurement and accounts payable in one platform.
highlight.zh: Saldor 將每筆採購從申請一路帶到付款完成,在單一平台整合採購與應付帳款。

summary.en: Dayflow automatically generates a detailed log of everything you've worked on.
summary.zh: Dayflow 自動生成你所有工作內容的詳細紀錄。

highlight.en: Dayflow builds open-source productivity tools that help founders and engineers make the most of their time by automatically logging their work.
highlight.zh: Dayflow 打造開源生產力工具,透過自動記錄工作內容,協助創辦人與工程師充分運用時間。

summary.en: Keet provides authentication for AI agents to act on users' behalf.
summary.zh: Keet 為 AI 代理提供身分驗證,使其能代表使用者行動。

highlight.en: Keet manages users' authenticated sessions and provides stable integrations on any web platform, so an AI agent can access healthcare data or send LinkedIn messages via its API or SDK.
highlight.zh: Keet 管理使用者的已驗證工作階段,並在任何網頁平台提供穩定整合,讓 AI 代理可透過其 API 或 SDK 存取醫療資料或發送 LinkedIn 訊息。

summary.en: et al. is a mobile app that aggregates your go-to sources into an LLM-powered feed of insights.
summary.zh: et al. 是一款行動應用程式,將你的常用資訊來源彙整成由大型語言模型驅動的洞見動態。

highlight.en: et al. extracts key takeaways from newsletters, research papers, and articles into short insights, so you stay on top of breakthroughs in your field without actively searching or reading everything.
highlight.zh: et al. 從電子報、研究論文與文章中萃取重點,化為簡短洞見,讓你無需主動搜尋或通讀全文,便能掌握所屬領域的突破。

summary.en: Void is an open-source code editor positioned as a Cursor alternative.
summary.zh: Void 是一款開源程式碼編輯器,定位為 Cursor 的替代方案。

highlight.en: With features similar to Cursor and GitHub Copilot, Void lets developers keep their data completely private by connecting directly to any LLM.
highlight.zh: Void 具備類似 Cursor 與 GitHub Copilot 的功能,並讓開發者直接連接任何大型語言模型,使其資料完全保密。

summary.en: Formula Insight helps institutional investors manage, track, and query their Excel models.
summary.zh: Formula Insight 協助機構投資人管理、追蹤並查詢其 Excel 模型。

highlight.en: Formula Insight provides a central repository of financial models so investors can track forecast changes, quantify projection accuracy, and systematize the investment process.
highlight.zh: Formula Insight 提供財務模型的集中儲存庫,讓投資人追蹤預測變動、量化推估準確度,並使投資流程系統化。

summary.en: Village Labs helps America's businesses become employee owned via employee stock ownership plans.
summary.zh: Village Labs 透過員工持股計畫協助美國企業轉為員工所有。

highlight.en: With 2.9M Baby Boomer owners set to retire, Village Labs sets up and manages ESOPs so owners get a fair price and tax benefits while employees keep jobs and gain shares.
highlight.zh: 面對 290 萬名嬰兒潮世代業主即將退休,Village Labs 設立並管理員工持股計畫,讓業主獲得公允價格與稅務優惠,員工則保住工作並取得股份。

summary.en: OrgOrg is an organizational productivity suite that keeps teams productive and healthy at any size.
summary.zh: OrgOrg 是一套組織生產力工具組,讓任何規模的團隊保持高效與健康。

highlight.en: Founded by the creator of Zenter (which became Google Slides), OrgOrg extends Google Workspace with Go links, personality-rich profiles, and goal tracking.
highlight.zh: 由 Zenter(後成為 Google Slides)的創造者所創立,OrgOrg 以 Go links、富個性的個人檔案與目標追蹤功能擴充 Google Workspace。

summary.en: DreamRP builds technology and platforms for human creators and the entertainment industry.
summary.zh: DreamRP 為人類創作者與娛樂產業打造技術與平台。

highlight.en: Arguing AI feels like slop when companies bet on technology over people, DreamRP builds for creatives from indie artists to global stars, treating AI as a power-up in the right hands.
highlight.zh: DreamRP 主張當企業押注技術而非人才時,AI 便淪為粗製濫造,因此它為從獨立藝術家到全球巨星的創作者打造工具,將 AI 視為在對的人手中的助力。

summary.en: Panora turns messy inboxes into ERP-ready data by automating purchase order entry.
summary.zh: Panora 透過自動化採購單輸入,將雜亂的收件匣轉為可供 ERP 使用的資料。

highlight.en: Panora automates PO entry for distributors, manufacturers, and wholesalers, stopping wrong shipments, blocking duplicates, and reclaiming about 80% of order-entry time.
highlight.zh: Panora 為經銷商、製造商與批發商自動化採購單輸入,杜絕錯誤出貨、阻擋重複訂單,並收回約 80% 的訂單輸入時間。

summary.en: Opslane verifies that AI-generated code actually works before you ship it.
summary.zh: Opslane 在你發布前驗證 AI 生成的程式碼確實可運作。

highlight.en: Opslane opens your app in a real browser, clicks through what the PR changed, and posts screenshots, video, and data checks as proof the change works.
highlight.zh: Opslane 在真實瀏覽器中開啟你的應用程式,點擊測試 PR 所改動之處,並附上截圖、影片與資料檢查作為其可運作的證明。

summary.en: Stempad is Notion for science, a pen-and-paper alternative for fast scientific writing and collaboration.
summary.zh: Stempad 是科學界的 Notion,是快速科學書寫與協作的紙筆替代品。

highlight.en: Stempad lets users switch between forms of technical visualization with the ease of a whiteboard and the convenience of a keyboard, sharing, collaborating, annotating, and writing papers in real time.
highlight.zh: Stempad 讓使用者以白板般的便利與鍵盤的方便,在各種技術視覺化形式間切換,並即時分享、協作、註解與撰寫論文。

summary.en: bluedoor makes the world's data ready for AI to use.
summary.zh: bluedoor 讓世界各地的資料整理就緒,供 AI 使用。

highlight.en: bluedoor is a set of APIs and data sources designed to be easy for AIs to consume.
highlight.zh: bluedoor 是一組 API 與資料來源,設計上讓 AI 易於取用。

summary.en: Omnidock is an OS for the global e-commerce expansion of brands and manufacturers.
summary.zh: Omnidock 是品牌與製造商拓展全球電商的作業系統。

highlight.en: Acting as merchant of record, Omnidock reads a brand's catalog, assesses marketplace eligibility, auto-launches products via pre-vetted accounts, and handles all transactions across marketplaces.
highlight.zh: Omnidock 作為記錄商家,讀取品牌型錄、評估各市集的上架資格、透過預審帳號自動上架產品,並跨各市集處理所有交易。

summary.en: Undermind is an AI agent that handles extremely complex scientific research questions.
summary.zh: Undermind 是一款處理極複雜科學研究問題的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Undermind uses LLMs to adaptively explore databases like a human researcher, outperforming keyword search and other AI retrieval by 10–50x for the 50M researchers on PubMed and Google Scholar.
highlight.zh: Undermind 運用大型語言模型像人類研究者般自適應地探索資料庫,效能比關鍵字搜尋與其他 AI 檢索方法高 10–50 倍,服務 PubMed 與 Google Scholar 上的 5000 萬名研究者。

summary.en: Spaceium builds fully automated space stations to refuel and repair spacecraft in space.
summary.zh: Spaceium 打造全自動太空站,在太空中為太空船加油與維修。

highlight.en: Spaceium has secured $86.1M in binding commercial contracts with a $230M pipeline, and its stations transfer cryogenic and non-cryogenic fuels with zero loss via a proprietary modular robotic arm.
highlight.zh: Spaceium 已取得 8610 萬美元具約束力的商業合約並有 2.3 億美元的潛在訂單,其太空站透過專利模組化機械臂,以零損耗轉移低溫與非低溫燃料。

summary.en: Random Labs is building long-running autonomous coding agents.
summary.zh: Random Labs 正在打造長時間運行的自主編程代理。

highlight.en: Random Labs is building Slate, a coding agent designed to work alongside you for long hours on hard problems.
highlight.zh: Random Labs 正在打造 Slate,一款設計來與你長時間並肩攻克難題的編程代理。

summary.en: DigitalCarbon transforms images and videos into immersive, photorealistic 3D environments with AI.
summary.zh: DigitalCarbon 運用 AI 將圖片與影片轉化為沉浸式、擬真的 3D 環境。

highlight.en: Founded by the first two hires at YC company AssemblyAI, DigitalCarbon renders 3D scenes from any device's photos at 100+ frames per second, enabling real estate tours and 3D product visualizations.
highlight.zh: 由 YC 公司 AssemblyAI 的前兩名員工創立,DigitalCarbon 能從任何裝置的照片以每秒 100 幀以上渲染 3D 場景,實現房地產導覽與 3D 產品視覺化。

summary.en: Emergent is an AI app builder that turns ideas into monetizable software via plain language.
summary.zh: Emergent 是一款 AI 應用建構工具,透過白話語言將點子變成可變現的軟體。

highlight.en: Emergent's coding agents generate, test, and deploy production apps from plain-language intent; it reached $50M ARR in 7 months with 5M+ users across 190+ countries building 6M+ apps.
highlight.zh: Emergent 的編程代理能依白話意圖生成、測試並部署正式應用程式;它在 7 個月內達到 5000 萬美元 ARR,橫跨 190 多國、逾 500 萬名使用者打造了 600 萬個以上應用。

summary.en: Crustdata provides real-time B2B company and people data via simple APIs.
summary.zh: Crustdata 透過簡易的 API 提供即時的 B2B 公司與人物資料。

highlight.en: Piping in live data from over a dozen sources, Crustdata powers builders of AI SDRs, recruiting, and due-diligence platforms with instantly delivered company and people data.
highlight.zh: Crustdata 從十多個來源匯入即時資料,以即時遞送的公司與人物資料,支撐打造 AI 業務開發、招募與盡職調查平台的開發者。

summary.en: Ember is AI revenue cycle management that delivers A/R analysis in 3 days or less and reduces claim denials by 55%.
summary.zh: Ember 是 AI 營收週期管理,在 3 天內完成應收帳款分析並將理賠拒付減少 55%。

highlight.en: Ember combines ambient listening with deep medical billing knowledge to eliminate the documentation burden that costs practices billions in incomplete records, missed billing, and denied claims.
highlight.zh: Ember 結合環境聆聽與深厚的醫療帳務知識,消除那因紀錄不全、漏記帳與遭拒理賠而讓診所損失數十億美元的文件負擔。

summary.en: telli builds AI phone agents that convert leads into sales opportunities for B2C companies.
summary.zh: telli 打造 AI 電話代理,為 B2C 企業將潛在客戶轉化為銷售機會。

highlight.en: Serving energy, real estate, medical, and home services, telli automates the pre-sales agent role end-to-end—for example fully automating pre-qualification for a leading home-buying platform.
highlight.zh: telli 服務能源、房地產、醫療與居家服務業,端到端自動化售前專員的角色,例如為一家領先的購屋平台全面自動化資格預審。
